asset.title: Chat
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: The walkthrough effectively demonstrates the public chat feature within a NodeRoom workspace, showing real-time message input and rendering.

featureClarity.evidence: The video clearly shows a user typing and sending a message in the public chat area.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the empty chat state, typing a message, and the message appearing in the chat log.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-themed UI, though the camera zoom transition is slightly abrupt.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with the NodeRoom concept of rooms containing files, agents, and chat.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Captured directly from a live web application interface with realistic data.

legibility.evidence: Text in the chat input and message log is readable, aided by the zoom.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Demonstrates collaboration context relevant to teams reviewing financial files.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts the UI behavior during message entry and submission.

defects.observed: The camera zoom into the chat box is sudden and slightly jarring.
defects.fix: Smooth out the transition or maintain a consistent viewport scale.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Send real-time messages and commands directly within your collaborative room.
